products.name: Paracetamol 500mg (Box of 100)
products.description: Effective pain relief and fever reducer. Suitable for headaches, body aches, and mild to moderate pain. Each tablet provides fast-acting symptomatic relief.

products.name: Amoxicillin 250mg (Box of 50)
products.description: Broad-spectrum penicillin antibiotic for bacterial infections of the ear, nose, throat, urinary tract, and skin. Prescription only.

products.name: Digital BP Monitor
products.description: Automatic upper-arm blood pressure monitor with intellisense technology. Stores up to 60 readings, irregular heartbeat detection, and large LCD display.

products.name: Cetirizine 10mg (Strip of 10)
products.description: Second-generation antihistamine. Provides 24-hour relief from sneezing, runny nose, watery eyes, and itching due to allergies.

products.name: Metformin 500mg (Box of 100)
products.description: Oral antihyperglycemic for type 2 diabetes. Improves insulin sensitivity and reduces hepatic glucose production.

products.name: Atorvastatin 10mg (Strip of 15)
products.description: HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor for lowering LDL cholesterol and reducing cardiovascular risk. Once-daily dosing.

products.name: Cough Syrup 100ml
products.description: Expectorant cough formula for productive cough. Helps loosen mucus and provides soothing relief for throat irritation.
products.composition: Ambroxol Hydrochloride 30 mg / 5 ml; Guaifenesin 50 mg / 5 ml

products.name: Insulin Glargine 100IU/ml
products.description: Long-acting basal insulin analog. Provides 24-hour glycemic control with once-daily subcutaneous injection. Refrigerate.

products.name: Vitamin D3 60K (Strip of 4)
products.description: High-strength weekly cholecalciferol supplement. Treats and prevents vitamin D deficiency, supports bone and immune health.

products.name: Antiseptic Cream 30g
products.description: Topical antiseptic for minor cuts, abrasions, insect bites, and skin infections. Forms a protective layer over wounds.

products.name: Eye Drops Lubricant 10ml
products.description: Artificial tears for dry eye relief. Lubricates and protects the eye surface, ideal for screen-strain and contact lens wearers.

products.name: Pantoprazole 40mg (Strip of 15)
products.description: Proton pump inhibitor for acid reflux, gastric and duodenal ulcers, and Zollinger-Ellison syndrome. Take 30 minutes before food.
